name: Team Ryan
subject: Do you support tax reform?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Ryan, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Ryan for Congress, Inc
body:
Friend --

Paul Ryan has a plan to re-work our tax code so that it works for you.

Our tax system hasn't changed for 31 years. **Not only is it out-of-date, but**** it's onerous, confusing, and way too expensive. **Worst of all,**it 's****** ** not set up to help you succeed. **
****
[**This has to change.**](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MzAyNjk2OTES1&r=NDY4NTQ0MTA2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTEwMjQ4Mjc4MAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

_Friend, our tax system hasn 't changed since 1986!_ If you're ready for a better way,****[**will you take a stand today?**](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MzAyNjk2OTES1&r=NDY4NTQ0MTA2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTEwMjQ4Mjc4MAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

Together, we will get this done.

Thank you,

Team Ryan

| [Take a Stand](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MzAyNjk2OTES1&r=NDY4NTQ0MTA2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTEwMjQ4Mjc4MAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---

Washington, D.C. 20003

name: The White House
subject: New American Strategy For Afghanistan Will Undo Past Failures
body:
1600 Daily
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=be406b2690999faaddebc3eac1db8933d8ac954ca00d7bbe6ea2b6c66b7af002ad248f1b20ef95d0dc5fc4a16ebfac5c31c81275cd3f8816

President Trump’s top priority remains Making America Safe Again and protecting the American people. The President has approved a new strategy for South Asia to ensure that terrorists will never again use Afghanistan as a haven to attack the United States.

-------------

President Trump Addresses the Nation on the South Asia Strategy

Shortly after President Trump’s inauguration, he directed Secretary of Defense Mattis and his national security team to undertake a comprehensive review of all strategic options in Afghanistan and South Asia. Last night, the President outlined his strategy for the region.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=be406b2690999faa0fa2b2f5c1f83e7ad8840edc5c08fd112f23fcf30f24d013bd6c68961dcb67221c35061a94e432a201966eb5c23682c2
Watch the President’s Address

Vice President Pence's OpEd in USA Today
"President Trump’s strategy for South Asia will undo the failed policies of the past and put the safety and security of the American people first. And with the president’s leadership, with the courage of our armed forces, and with the prayers of our people: America will be stronger, safer and more secure than ever before.” – Vice President Pence

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=be406b2690999faaebfdfbc0b49c250cd0c0f7d5112028b83b06de0e1946cdf5ede49375d1f669a9a88677325e58296d697e0f44143d58ce
Read more

The Great American Solar Eclipse in Washington D.C.

The President and First Family, along with members of the President’s Cabinet, watched the Great American Solar Eclipse from the Truman Balcony at the White House. The Vice President also hosted students at the Naval Observatory.

Photo of the Day

President Donald J. Trump's Presidential Address to the Nation | August 21, 2017 (Official White House Photo by Shealah Craighead)

POTUS and VP TODAY

Today, President Trump will travel to Arizona for a tour of U.S. Customs and Border Protection Border equipment and a meet and greet with Marines.

Coming Up This Week

Tomorrow, the President will address the National Convention of the American Legion in Nevada. The Vice President will be in Miami to meet with members of the Venezuelan exile community, recent Venezuelan migrants, other local leaders and officials about the continuing devastation and unrest in Venezuela.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=be406b2690999faa45d0cda43fab9a5df0ced4520a5e75cd91fa12d3b86eebc9f776314309cbff391401923be770f6029a8bd84d62eba366
Privacy Policy |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=be406b2690999faaa0de1928daf1456e49f6ffd544e750309d353624f831fca0c13667aa8bf7e592fb0a17d570cfd773580c7e3cb0f66262
Contact the White House |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d41aff50de3fc59a6051e195aefce68289b1b2575d6840cb8ac14c8532c4c6d497a1ba7df08b252ac1456fa8d25f79c793
Unsubscribe

name: Newt Gingrich
subject: Your invitation inside
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican National Committee
body:
You’re someone the President can trust. |
---
| | |

Peter,

You're someone the President can trust.

And there really aren't many he can, Peter. An unprecedented number of people are trying to sabotage President Trump and tear down our movement.

The reason for sabotage is simple. President Trump doesn't play by Washington's rules. He's promised to break through the corruption. He challenges the status quo. And the status quo will fight to keep their power up until the very last one has been dethroned.

Which is why we need to step up our efforts to defend the President.

**I 'm inviting you to join the 2017 President's Trust in order to be sure we have a reserve for targeted ads, true emergencies, and critical grassroots programs. **
---
| **[Please accept your invitation to become a member of the 2017 President's Trust with a generous contribution of $1.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=ac907c06cb1bd439be1a965aa712c268a987f98f64125c81e916cd12fdf26e4467c95b7eb62a0d45311e8bf415b5366b)**
[CONTRIBUTE $1](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=ac907c06cb1bd439fd1d234d2a616766da18c24f51264ac63c52c23a6d8d8457390f502ad491d670ba8baa40e927c6cd) _Please note: We will send the President a report on how much we 've already put into our reserves by Saturday August 26 and which leaders accepted their invitations to join. I hope your name is on that list._

We're just over six months into Donald Trump's historic presidency and the efforts to take him down are growing bigger by the day.

Even if President Trump is still standing strong, we simply can't allow phony stories, witch hunts, and baseless attacks to consume too much time that could be spent enacting our bold agenda.

While the President's Trust has been around for past Republican presidents, it couldn't be any clearer that we need it now more than ever.

**[I hope you accept your invitation to join the 2017 President's Trust with a generous contribution of $1 and get added to the list of trusted supporters that we'll send to the President.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=ac907c06cb1bd439f95046aaab53ea7f208b3d0a4e59d54344c157e5618c5ef37491431123d480c8ad0322c0892586a3)**

Thank you,

[](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=ac907c06cb1bd4391bb7a5204f2e0fe0f4643d2196426bf45c58a69dc0e98c8c0dc3ec6ca7447878c567fb7d261948f8)
Newt Gingrich [CONTRIBUTE $1](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=ac907c06cb1bd4397cc6e6648d1c946c936b0de3cbd61697b60e1747ad8b2cbe4801d97b61005909945328fd685b98cb)
---

Paid for by the Republican National Committee
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
[www.GOP.com](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=ac907c06cb1bd43966a921667f5deba385a9b7d8c59366eaf070ecd74ff623b875b09284dff1e4fdab705fd90b1d13d4) You are receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com
Republican National Committee (RNC), 310 1st St SE Washington, DC, 20003-1885, US

We believe this is an important way to reach our grassroots supporters with the most up-to-date information regarding the efforts of the Republican Party and President Trump, and we're glad you're on our team. It's because of grassroots supporters like you that we will Make America Great Again, and we appreciate your support. Thank you for all that you do!

[Privacy Policy](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=ac907c06cb1bd4393a5cafe93a56160721fb52e869480612ab1f95a97b1416af1c96c67b326116e7a2cc3856dd7c724d) | [Unsubscribe](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/unsub_center.aspx?qs=2d1444c0c3dd22abf1f6bd84f69019a079826705b89cc527f9cb738c2e12daed33cce3ecfce29ddfdc73b411b850c377) | [Update Profile](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/profile_center.aspx?qs=2d1444c0c3dd22ab291494658eff68202d789f94509d4846c0d21697d6d9075f22118d3d7388ab3dd55d75fc8ba0d781)
---

name: Team Kasich
subject: The latest
body:
Gov. Kasich issued the following statement in response to
President Trump's Afghanistan policy.

Peter, Gov. Kasich issued the
following statement in response to President Trump's Afghanistan
policy:

"After sixteen years, we have
lost sight of the the United States' principal goal in becoming
engaged in Afghanistan: to prevent the country from being used as
a launching pad for terror attacks on the U.S.

The United States should continue
to support the Afghan government through our Strategic
Partnership Agreement by providing training and funds that will
help the Afghans maintain control of major population centers and
prevent a Taliban victory.

The time has come, however, for
us to forge an agreement with all of the regional players that
will allow the United States to draw down forces and bring our
troops back home without reigniting civil war in that country.

We must work with neighboring
countries to station Special Forces and aircraft in the region in
a manner that allows us to eradicate terrorist bases that might
reappear in Afghanistan.

Sixteen years and the lives of
over 2,000 American heroes are more than enough of a price to
have paid to eradicate a terrorist sanctuary. America cannot
afford to make an open-ended commitment of further lives and
treasure to the improbable proposition of building a cohesive
nation in Afghanistan."

Also, in case you missed it, Gov.
John Kasich was a guest on CNN's State of the Union with Jake
Tapper on Sunday.

Please take a moment to watch and
share it on social media:

Paid for by Kasich
for America, not authorized by any candidate or candidate's
committee.
www.JohnKasich.com

You were added to the system July 18, 2015.

with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

subject: re: why Donald Trump must be censured
body:

name: Debbie
subject: No white supremacists in the White House
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail
body:
| |
---
| |
---
| Friends. Steve Bannon has been ousted from the White House. And that's good to see, albeit long overdue. But here's the big question now: **Will Trump stop there?** Steve Bannon is one man. The White House is still filled with people who espouse bigotry, hatred, and all kinds of hateful views. Stephen Miller and Sebastian Gorka are both high-ranking officials that are pushing the same worldview, policies, and hatred that Bannon did. **If Trump wants to prove he is sincere about condemning white supremacy, then he can prove it with his actions -- by firing all White House staffers, including Miller and Gorka, who peddle intolerance and bigotry.** Trump is always saying he's a strong, decisive leader. It's time he put up or shut up. [_**Call on Trump to immediately fire Stephen Miller and Sebastian Gorka.**_](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113e2e/622b7b5b/54fd6a6/307bdbc6/1748657919/VEsH/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e170822") Thank you, Debbie |
Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
[Click here](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113e2e/622b7b5b/54fd6a6/307bdbf9/1748657919/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://www.debbiewassermanschultz.com/subscriptions/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") to unsubscribe
---

name: Democrats.org
subject: No matter what Trump says or does tonight...
body:
Rise and organize.
---
**Commit today to rise above Donald Trump's hatred and organize to defeat him:

** **[I'M IN](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Rise-and-Organize1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+IM+IN&utm_campaign=em_20170822_joc_v2s1&source=em_20170822_joc_v2s1")**
Derek --

It's great to be back home in Arizona, but I wish I could say I was here under happier circumstances.

In the middle of one of the most disturbing periods of his administration so far, Donald Trump is holding a campaign rally. **[I'm here today to fight back.](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405237a2/4067b0a/3d16c0737/7e6f08f6/3897148536/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZtYVhKemRHNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IkRlcmVrIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IldpbGxpcyIsIkpTVmxiV0ZwYkNVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIiwiSlNWNmFYQWxKUT09IjoiMjAxMTIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/Rise-and-Organize1?firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+Im+here+today+to+fight+back&utm_campaign=em_20170822_joc_v2s1&source=em_20170822_joc_v2s1")**

Whenever criticism of Donald Trump has reached a fever pitch this year, he's turned to his most divisive policies. Tonight's rally is no different.

But let's be clear-eyed about why so many of us have spoken out against Donald Trump this week.

Donald Trump empowered the white supremacist groups who committed an act of domestic terrorism. He compared Nazis and the KKK to the peaceful protestors who opposed them. He described those who angrily marched on Charlottesville with torches, making Nazi salutes and chanting "Jews will not replace us," as "very fine people."

So if Donald Trump is at his most divisive tonight, if he again calls for a wall that is premised on prejudice and fear-mongering, I'll be here with all those who are speaking out against Trump's empowerment of hate and division. We'll make sure he knows that we will fight racism and reject the bigotry he has enabled.

**If you're with us, add your name and say so today:**

**[I'M IN](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Rise-and-Organize1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+IM+IN&utm_campaign=em_20170822_joc_v2s1&source=em_20170822_joc_v2s1")**
Thanks,

Jess

Jess O'Connell
Chief Executive Officer
Democratic National Committee

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405237a2/4067b0a/3d16c0737/7e6f08f4/3897148536/VEsC/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170822_joc_v2s1&source=em_20170822_joc_v2s1"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405237a2/4067b0a/3d16c0737/7e6f08f5/3897148536/VEsD/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170822_joc_v2s1&source=em_20170822_joc_v2s1"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405237a2/4067b0a/3d16c0737/7e6f08f2/3897148536/VEsA/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170822_joc_v2s1&source=em_20170822_joc_v2s1") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405237a2/4067b0a/3d16c0737/7e6f08f3/3897148536/VEsB/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170822_joc_v2s1&source=em_20170822_joc_v2s1"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.
clean_body: Rise and organize. Commit today to rise above Donald Trump's hatred and organize to defeat him: "" Derek -- It's great to be back home in Arizona, but I wish I could say I was here under happier circumstances. In the middle of one of the most disturbing periods of his administration so far, Donald Trump is holding a campaign rally. "" Whenever criticism of Donald Trump has reached a fever pitch this year, he's turned to his most divisive policies. Tonight's rally is no different. But let's be clear-eyed about why so many of us have spoken out against Donald Trump this week. Donald Trump empowered the white supremacist groups who committed an act of domestic terrorism. He compared Nazis and the KKK to the peaceful protestors who opposed them. He described those who angrily marched on Charlottesville with torches, making Nazi salutes and chanting "Jews will not replace us," as "very fine people." So if Donald Trump is at his most divisive tonight, if he again calls for a wall that is premised on prejudice and fear-mongering, I'll be here with all those who are speaking out against Trump's empowerment of hate and division. We'll make sure he knows that we will fight racism and reject the bigotry he has enabled. If you're with us, add your name and say so today: "" Thanks, Jess Jess O'Connell Chief Executive Officer Democratic National Committee Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: Team Donnelly
subject: Ask Joe!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
|
---

| | Peter,

Team Donnelly reporting from the road!

The RV is rolling and the Campaign Kick Off Tour is well underway. The team's doing well and Joe's had the chance to speak with Hoosiers about what matters to them. But, you know Joe. He'd stop to talk with everyone in Indiana if he could. He wants to stop at every rest stop, shake every hand, and make sure _everyone 's_ voice is heard.

**So, we 're opening up an "Ask Joe" virtual Q&A to make sure he can!**

**[If you have a question for Joe, will you take a moment and submit it to our virtual mail bag by clicking here?](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c27c1/7377f838/37a49472/51fbc7c8/1652568549/VEsH/ "https://www.surveymonkey.com/r/augqa")** | [**SUBMIT YOUR QUESTION >>**](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c27c1/7377f838/37a49472/51fbc7c8/1652568549/VEsE/ "https://www.surveymonkey.com/r/augqa")
---
We'll be sitting down with Joe on our tour this week to share your questions with him, and we'll report back with his answers.

**In the meantime, thanks so much for all you do to keep this campaign going.**

Safe travels,

Team Donnelly

name: Roy Cooper
subject: Partisan games
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
Over the weekend, Republican legislators revealed their new redistricting maps.
|
[](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/120320a/2fde7c66/454a1b1b/15695c7a/2794456233/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIiwiSlNWYVNWQWxKUT09IjoiMjg0NTcifQ==/ "http://act.roycooper.com/page/s/add-your-name-redistricting?&firstname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=28457&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em17_170822_redistrict_adv_gq_ful__rc&source=em17_170822_redistrict_adv_gq_ful__rc")
---
Friend.

Over the weekend, Republican legislators revealed their new redistricting maps.

These new maps make one thing clear: North Carolina badly needs a non-partisan redistricting process.

By drawing maps that protect their incumbent legislators, Republicans showed that they are more interested in playing partisan games than setting up a fair process for North Carolinians.

**[Join me in telling Republicans in the General Assembly to stop playing games with our electoral process.](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/120320a/2fde7c66/454a1b1b/15695c7d/2794456233/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIiwiSlNWYVNWQWxKUT09IjoiMjg0NTcifQ==/ "http://act.roycooper.com/page/s/add-your-name-redistricting?&firstname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=28457&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&utm_content=2+-+Join+me+in+telling+Republicans+in+the+Ge&utm_campaign=em17_170822_redistrict_adv_gq_ful__rc&source=em17_170822_redistrict_adv_gq_ful__rc")**

The stakes are high right now. The maps passed at the end of this process are the maps that will be used to elect members to the General Assembly in next year's election. If Republicans win huge margins again because of rigged maps, they'll control the redistricting process for the next decade and continue to draw unfair maps.

We always knew breaking the majority was going to take a lot of hard work and organizing, so working together on this is important right now.

**[Tell Republicans in the General Assembly to draw fairer maps.](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/120320a/2fde7c66/454a1b1b/15695c7c/2794456233/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIiwiSlNWYVNWQWxKUT09IjoiMjg0NTcifQ==/ "http://act.roycooper.com/page/s/add-your-name-redistricting?&firstname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=28457&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&utm_content=3+-+Tell+Republicans+in+the+General+Assembly&utm_campaign=em17_170822_redistrict_adv_gq_ful__rc&source=em17_170822_redistrict_adv_gq_ful__rc")**

Thanks for all you do for North Carolina,

Roy | | [**Add your name ->**](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/120320a/2fde7c66/454a1b1b/15695c7f/2794456233/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIiwiSlNWYVNWQWxKUT09IjoiMjg0NTcifQ==/ "http://act.roycooper.com/page/s/add-your-name-redistricting?&firstname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=28457&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&utm_content=4+-+Add+your+name+rarr&utm_campaign=em17_170822_redistrict_adv_gq_ful__rc&source=em17_170822_redistrict_adv_gq_ful__rc")
---

* * *

Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
---

Roy Cooper for North Carolina
PO Box 1190
Raleigh, NC 27602 United States

This email was sent to:
dpwillis67@gmail.com

To unsubscribe, go to:
[http://act.roycooper.com/unsubscribe](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/120320a/2fde7c66/454a1b1b/15695c7e/2794456233/VEsD/ "http://act.roycooper.com/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&utm_content=5+-+httpactroycoopercomunsubscribe&utm_campaign=em17_170822_redistrict_adv_gq_ful__rc&source=em17_170822_redistrict_adv_gq_ful__rc")

body:

name: INSTANT SURVEY (via Florida Democrats)
subject: Rick Scott said WHAT?!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Florida Democratic Party
body:
Friend -- We can't believe what Rick Scott just said.

First, he refused to condemn Donald Trump's claims that white supremacists and anti-racism protesters were equally responsible for the violence in Charlottesville.

NOW, Scott said there's "no moral authority on both sides" when it comes to the violence.

That's why we need to hear from you immediately: | **Do you think Rick Scott should unequivocally condemn hateful rhetoric from Donald Trump and white supremacists?**

| | [YES](http://act.floridadems. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fdp-cvillesurvey?amount=5&recurring=automatic&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=1+-+YES&utm_campaign=em082217&source=em082217&refcode=em082217")

name: Q & A
subject: Have a question for Paul Ryan?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Ryan, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Ryan for Congress, Inc
body:
Friend,

Last night, Paul Ryan joined Jake Tapper for a CNN Town Hall in Wisconsin to answer questions from his constituents about the Republican agenda.

Read the highlights below or watch the video [**here**](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MzAyODg3OTkS1&r=NDY4NTQ0MTA2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTEwMjYwOTQzMwS2&mt=1&rt=0), then let us know if you have a question that wasn't answered.

**Simplify the Tax Code**
It's a matter of economic growth. It's faster wages. But also, it's fairness. What we're proposing on the individual side is get rid of the loopholes, get rid of the carve-outs. Just lower people's tax rates. Let you keep more of your own money. And simplify the code so much that you can fill out your taxes on a postcard.

**Keep America Competitive**
If we keep taxing our job creators, our businesses, at much, much higher tax rates than our foreign competitors tax theirs, we're going to lose. We're going to lose in global competition.

And so what's happening is we're losing American businesses. The biggest business we had in Wisconsin, publicly traded, was Johnson Controls ... They are now an Irish company. Their worldwide tax rate is 12.5 percent. They're not an American company anymore. We're losing businesses left and right. And this is among the reasons why we have to have fundamental tax reform.

**Let 's Get It Done**
We want a tax code built for growth, built for economic activity. We want a tax code that raises wages, keeps American companies in America, gives us faster economic growth ... And so that is why we are committed to getting this done.

**Charlottesville**
This issue speaks to humanity, our country, our society, our culture. Every single one of us needs to unify and stand up against this repulsive, this repugnant, vile bigotry.

But my point is, we've got to keep our moral outrage, and we all have to stand up and speak out against this kind of bigotry so that it is never normalized, so that we don't give these people oxygen that they're looking for. ********

**Obamacare**
Obamacare is collapsing. It is really -- it is collapsing under its own weight. Next year, it's projected 47 percent of all the counties in America -- that's almost one in two counties in America -- are down to one health insurer. Since Obamacare started, premiums have gone up more than 100 percent ... The reason I'm disappointed is because the status quo is not an option. Obamacare is not working ... A third of the counties in Wisconsin are down to one insurer right here. We've got dozens of counties around America that have zero insurers left.

**Getting Things Done**
The House has passed over 300 bills in the first 6 months of this Trump presidency, 300 ... You probably don't know that in the House we passed a complete overhaul of career technical education, to close that skills gap, to get people from where they are into the careers that they want. You probably didn't know that we passed a repeal and replace of the entire Dodd-Frank law because we're losing up to one community bank a day in America. This is where small businesses get their money from, community banks. And we're losing them because of this law.

You probably didn't even know that we overhauled the entire Veterans Administration to crack down on the fraud and the waste that was occurring with these waiting lists.

You probably didn't know that we expanded the biggest G.I. expansion from the G.I. bill in a decade. You may not have known that we have had one of the biggest increases in military spending last April to make good on what the president was just talking about of rebuilding our military.

**Afghanistan strategy**
I'm pleased with the decision (the President's decision) ... And I think we have to recognize the fact -- and here's why it matters to us as Americans, why this is in our national security interest. We cannot allow another safe haven for terrorists to materialize again. Look at what was happening in Mosul, in Syria, with ISIS. We can't afford to allow that to happen again. And that is why this matters to us ... We've learned some good lessons in Mosul, in Syria, lessons that are being applied right now. And I think they're carrying over those lessons learned to Afghanistan ... And that is why I think it's important that we don't telegraph -- I think that was a strategic mistake the last president made, that we shouldn't telegraph our timetable when we're leaving so that we can actually make it conditions-based, which is what is the purpose of being there. The purpose of being there is to make sure that we don't have another 9/11, that the Taliban doesn't give Al Qaeda safe haven to plan and get money and come and have a terrorist attack against us.

**Wisconsin Is Home**
You are my employer. I work for you. And so my job as your employee is when running for office is to tell you who I am, what I believe, what are my values and principles, and what are the policies I work on. That's exactly what I'm in the middle of executing right now in the House. ****

**Have a question that wasn 't asked? Submit your question here: [https://secure.speakerryan.com/go/2017-ask-paul/](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MzAyODg3OTkS1&r=NDY4NTQ0MTA2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTEwMjYwOTQzMwS2&mt=1&rt=0)**

We'll select three questions for Paul to answer. Keep an eye out to see if your question was picked!

Thanks!

Team Ryan

| [**Submit your Question**](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MzAyODg3OTkS1&r=NDY4NTQ0MTA2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTEwMjYwOTQzMwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---

Paid for by Team Ryan, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Ryan for Congress, Inc., Prosperity Action, Inc., and the NRCC.

Team Ryan
320 First Street, SE
Washington, D.C. 20003
---

This message reflects the opinions and representations of Team Ryan. You are receiving this email because you signed up as a member of Team Ryan's online community. Click [here](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/servlet/OneClickOptOutServlet?m=30288799&r=NDY4NTQ0MTA2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTEwMjYwOTQzMwS2&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe from Team Ryan.

We want a tax code that raises wages, keeps American companies in America, gives us faster economic growth ... And so that is why we are committed to getting this done. Charlottesville This issue speaks to humanity, our country, our society, our culture. Every single one of us needs to unify and stand up against this repulsive, this repugnant, vile bigotry. But my point is, we've got to keep our moral outrage, and we all have to stand up and speak out against this kind of bigotry so that it is never normalized, so that we don't give these people oxygen that they're looking for. ****** Obamacare Obamacare is collapsing. It is really -- it is collapsing under its own weight. Next year, it's projected 47 percent of all the counties in America -- that's almost one in two counties in America -- are down to one health insurer. Since Obamacare started, premiums have gone up more than 100 percent ... The reason I'm disappointed is because the status quo is not an option. Obamacare is not working ... A third of the counties in Wisconsin are down to one insurer right here. We've got dozens of counties around America that have zero insurers left. Getting Things Done The House has passed over 300 bills in the first 6 months of this Trump presidency, 300 ... You probably don't know that in the House we passed a complete overhaul of career technical education, to close that skills gap, to get people from where they are into the careers that they want. You probably didn't know that we passed a repeal and replace of the entire Dodd-Frank law because we're losing up to one community bank a day in America. This is where small businesses get their money from, community banks. And we're losing them because of this law. You probably didn't even know that we overhauled the entire Veterans Administration to crack down on the fraud and the waste that was occurring with these waiting lists. You probably didn't know that we expanded the biggest G.I. expansion from the G.I. bill in a decade. You may not have known that we have had one of the biggest increases in military spending last April to make good on what the president was just talking about of rebuilding our military. Afghanistan strategy I'm pleased with the decision (the President's decision) ... And I think we have to recognize the fact -- and here's why it matters to us as Americans, why this is in our national security interest. We cannot allow another safe haven for terrorists to materialize again. Look at what was happening in Mosul, in Syria, with ISIS. We can't afford to allow that to happen again. And that is why this matters to us ... We've learned some good lessons in Mosul, in Syria, lessons that are being applied right now. And I think they're carrying over those lessons learned to Afghanistan ... And that is why I think it's important that we don't telegraph -- I think that was a strategic mistake the last president made, that we shouldn't telegraph our timetable when we're leaving so that we can actually make it conditions-based, which is what is the purpose of being there. The purpose of being there is to make sure that we don't have another 9/11, that the Taliban doesn't give Al Qaeda safe haven to plan and get money and come and have a terrorist attack against us. Wisconsin Is Home You are my employer. I work for you. And so my job as your employee is when running for office is to tell you who I am, what I believe, what are my values and principles, and what are the policies I work on. That's exactly what I'm in the middle of executing right now in the House. Have a question that wasn 't asked? Submit your question here: ** We'll select three questions for Paul to answer. Keep an eye out to see if your question was picked! Thanks! Team Ryan | Paid for by Team Ryan, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Ryan for Congress, Inc., Prosperity Action, Inc., and the NRCC. Team Ryan 320 First Street, SE Washington, D.C. 20003 This message reflects the opinions and representations of Team Ryan. You are receiving this email because you signed up as a member of Team Ryan's online community. Click to unsubscribe from Team Ryan.

name: Lucinda Guinn, EMILY's List
subject: 2x endorsements in Virginia
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c66d6/24c69fd9/aea87663/18982480/221385841/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFE840N_digital_email_20170822_AugustVAEndorsements_inact&source=WQEFE840N_digital_email_20170822_AugustVAEndorsements_inact")
---

Peter,

Something amazing is happening in Virginia:

Since the election, more women than ever before have launched campaigns to win state legislative seats.

In June, we announced our support for eight strong progressive women running for House of Delegates seats.

And, now we're thrilled to be throwing our support behind EIGHT MORE -- and every single one of them is running for a seat currently held by a Republican. These eight new women are key to helping flip the Virginia House from red to blue.

**[Ready to help turn red statehouses blue? Donate $3 to help our 16 women in Virginia and other endorsed women running in local races across the country build strong campaigns.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c66d6/24c69fd9/aea87663/18982481/221385841/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170822_email_AugustVAEndorsements?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Ready+to+help+turn+red+statehouses+blue+&utm_campaign=WQEFE840N_digital_email_20170822_AugustVAEndorsements_inact&source=WQEFE840N_digital_email_20170822_AugustVAEndorsements_inact")**

Here's some background on our eight newly endorsed candidates ready to flip seats and unseat Republicans in the Virginia House of Delegates:
**Dawn Marie Adams (HD-68)** is a registered nurse practitioner running against a Republican incumbent to flip a key seat. If she and Danica Roem (HD-13) -- another woman we've endorsed -- are elected, they will be the first LGBTQ women to serve in the Virginia Legislature!

**Karrie Delaney (HD-67)** is the daughter of a veteran, and she is a community leader dedicated to ensuring women receive equal pay for equal work, paid family leave, and access to critical health care services. Karrie is running to flip a red seat blue in a district that voted 58 percent for Hillary Clinton last year.

**Elizabeth Guzman (HD-31)** is a public administrator, social worker, and mother. She emigrated from Peru as a single mother looking for better opportunities for her child. She could be the first Latina to be elected to the House of Delegates.

**Djuna Osborne (HD-17)** has spent more than a decade in community mental health. As a licensed clinical social worker, she understands how important access to health care and mental health services is for Virginians. She will be the first Democrat to challenge the Republican incumbent in this seat since 2013.

**Debra Rodman (HD-73)** is an associate professor at Randolph-Macon College. She works as an expert witness helping women and children refugees seeking political asylum in federal courts. She is running against a Republican incumbent in a district that is becoming increasingly blue.

**Shelly Simonds (HD-94) **is an elected school board member, advocating for public school summer programs that keep kids in classrooms and out of the criminal justice system. Shelly is up against a three-term Republican incumbent in a district that narrowly turned blue last November.

**Kathy Tran (HD-42)** came to this country as a refugee who fled Vietnam with her family when she was just seven months old. For her and her family, this country has always represented opportunity, freedom, and hope. She's running for an open seat against an extreme right-wing Republican in a district that voted overwhelmingly for Hillary Clinton in 2016.

**Tia Walbridge (HD-33)** is a farmer and small business owner who is dedicated to fighting for the values of her local community in the General Assembly. Her strong primary turnout means she could flip this deep-red seat blue.
When we say the resistance is local, we aren't kidding!

Right now, Republicans control the state Senate and House of Delegates in Virginia, meaning Democratic Gov. Terry McAuliffe has been the only thing stopping a dangerous Republican agenda. (He's vetoed defunding Planned Parenthood TWICE!)

We've literally DOUBLED our list of endorsed candidates running for state legislative seats in Virginia because of the local enthusiasm to elect more Democrats.

**Donate $3 to help our women run strong campaigns that can shake up the Virginia House and state legislatures across the country:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Turn-Virginia-House-Blue](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c66d6/24c69fd9/aea87663/18982482/221385841/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170822_email_AugustVAEndorsements?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgTurnVirginiaHous&utm_campaign=WQEFE840N_digital_email_20170822_AugustVAEndorsements_inact&source=WQEFE840N_digital_email_20170822_AugustVAEndorsements_inact")**

Thanks,

Lucinda Guinn
Vice President of Campaigns, EMILY's List

[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c66d6/24c69fd9/aea87663/18982483/221385841/VEsC/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170822_email_AugustVAEndorsements?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=WQEFE840N_digital_email_20170822_AugustVAEndorsements_inact&source=WQEFE840N_digital_email_20170822_AugustVAEndorsements_inact")

|
# EMILY's List is a community of over five million members that helps elect pro-choice Democratic women to office.
---

|
---
Paid for by EMILY's List [www.emilyslist.org](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c66d6/24c69fd9/aea87663/189824bc/221385841/VEsD/ "http://www.emilyslist.org/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=5+-+wwwemilyslistorg&utm_campaign=WQEFE840N_digital_email_20170822_AugustVAEndorsements_inact&source=WQEFE840N_digital_email_20170822_AugustVAEndorsements_inact") and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
1800 M Street NW, Suite 375N, Washington, DC 20036 Thank you for being a supporter of EMILY's List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email [here](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c66d6/24c69fd9/aea87663/189824bd/221385841/VEsA/ "http://action.emilyslist.org/page/s/less-email-private-bc?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=WQEFE840N_digital_email_20170822_AugustVAEndorsements_inact&source=WQEFE840N_digital_email_20170822_AugustVAEndorsements_inact"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving all email, unsubscribe [here](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c66d6/24c69fd9/aea87663/189824be/221385841/VEsB/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=WQEFE840N_digital_email_20170822_AugustVAEndorsements_inact&source=WQEFE840N_digital_email_20170822_AugustVAEndorsements_inact"). Have a question? Feel free to drop us a line at [information@emilyslist.org](mailto:information@emilyslist.org) or simply reply to this email.

Contributions or gifts to EMILY's List or endorsed candidates are not tax deductible.
